reviews.review_description:
The gameplay is very simple and design is intuitive. You have a timer and lots of floating bubbles to pop.

Great game to showcase seniors what is mixed reality, it was very easy to show it to my parents and even elderly grandmother.

You can also make the play area as big as you like, so the game can become like an exercise, where you run around trying to get all the goodies. 

I wish there was a multiplayer version, so several people could play the game in the same area.

Bubble Spree is a super intuitive and fun game! I love how you simply look at your hands, and they transform into controllers - very intuitive. I let my friend’s kids try it, and they absolutely loved it! This game is definitely family-friendly and a great choice for all ages.

reviews.review_title: Small game, good for first time
reviews.review_description: Nice introductory game for people who have never played VR/MR - my parents enjoyed it and didn't knock down all the furniture while playing

If you're looking for a game for kids and even adults, or something fun to play during parties, give this game a shot. The gameplay is quite straightforward - just pop the bubbles.

I hope that in the future, there will be more diverse environments for the VR mode and maybe a music option for the Mixed Reality mode. Nevertheless, I really enjoyed this game!

reviews.review_title: How I can move the ballon aera ?
reviews.review_description:
The Start button and the ballon come in corner of my room where I can't play at all. I try many setting and all the button with no answer, yet.
Anyone help ?

developer_response.body: We're sorry you experienced this issue. Game elements appear randomly only in the Guardian zone. Try restarting the game or adjusting the Guardian settings.
